operation.summary: Upload certificate images for an ad account.  # noqa: E501

preconditions: env_fingerprint must match when applying from a reviewed plan

before_state.reason: This source tool can build and review TikTok Marketing write plans, but it does not yet save operation-specific before-state or provider backup data before applying them.

steps: Confirm no TikTok Marketing provider write endpoint was called.
Confirm no successful write receipt was emitted.
Confirm no receipt file was written.
verification_plan.required_before_live_write: Add command-specific before-state or provider-backup support before allowing apply.

legacy_verification_plan.notes: Write execution is accepted only from the HTTP result plus provider JSON response. No read-back is attempted in this build.

rollback.notes: No built-in rollback, backups, snapshots, or provider restore are available in this runtime. Treat current TikTok Marketing write families as irreversible_and_clearly_labeled and use the saved plan and refusal output for manual follow-up only.
